prompt: Write the chords as descending arpeggios — from highest to lowest note in 16th notes.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x
    n 55 52 48 55 52 48 55 52 48 55 52 48 55 52 48 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus

    n 65 67 69 72

    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x

    n 42
